text: Split Bill helps friends split a shared bill. No accounts needed.
Ramey adds momo and dal bhat with tax and tip, and invites Shyamey and Harkey to the bill.
Payment details are encrypted in the browser before anything is saved.
Ramey opens his dashboard to track who has claimed and paid.
He copies the share link so friends can open it on their phones.
Shyamey opens the link and picks his name from the roster.
Shyamey claims the momo and splits it with two people.
His share unlocks the payer's PayPal details — decrypted only in his browser.
Harkey joins the same split so each person owes half the momo.
Ramey sees per-item progress bars and can mark someone paid when the money arrives.
Harkey can also tap I've paid to notify Ramey directly.
The dashboard updates — two of two people paid.
Restaurants can search the menu with fuzzy matching — type scattered letters to find items like momo at Dal Bhat in Kathmandu.
